description_long: This object is a vertical, rectangular traffic delineator post with a wide, square base for stability. The front and back faces feature a white surface with diagonal orange reflective stripes, commonly used for high visibility in roadwork or construction zones. The post is made of a durable plastic material, likely polyethylene, and the base appears to be a heavier, rubberized or composite material to prevent tipping. The top of the post is flat with a rectangular cutout, possibly serving as a handle for easy transport. The sides of the post are plain white, tapering slightly as they rise from the base. The overall condition is lightly used, with minor scuffs and surface marks visible, but no significant damage.
description: A rectangular, white traffic delineator post with orange diagonal reflective stripes and a wide, heavy square base. The post features a handle cutout at the top and is made of durable plastic and rubber materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white post with orange diagonal reflective stripes and a rectangular handle cutout at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, slightly tapered white post and the thick, square black base.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with white surface and orange diagonal reflective stripes, and the handle cutout visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain white post and the wide, stable base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, diagonal orange reflective stripes on the front and back faces, each stripe approximately one-third the width of the post.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat with a rectangular cutout, solid white, and has no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is a thick, square, black platform, likely rubber, providing stability and weight; it has a slightly textured surface for grip.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on any side of the object.
attribute_condition: Lightly used, with minor scuffs and surface marks but no significant damage or fading.
